name: Takanashi Hoshino "Meet the New Student"
description:
"Uhhe, welcome newbie"

hi

I'm new here, this is my first bot. I just want to cry (I spent hours setting up my phone) and yes, I did it all on my damn phone (I hate myself!). But nice, now I have to die again.

Who am I? Never mind, and you can call me Reimos or Imperius (I won't put my DC for now).

NOTICE: I DON'T MAKE MINORS (THIS CHARACTER IS AGED) AND THERE ARE NO FETISHES (I HATE THEM).

Well, enjoy it and thanks for stopping by! Please leave comments or complaints about the quality or urgent changes for the bot (I don't promise I will, I'm forgetful).

Music: rises the moon

IMPERIAL 14 IS GONE (English is not my first or secondary language, I am not good at speaking)
